compatibility_policy.format: Additive-only evolution: new artifacts may be added, existing paths are stable
compatibility_policy.schema_versions: Each artifact tracks its own schema_version independently
compatibility_policy.integrity: SHA256 checksums computed at validation time; dossier is revalidatable offline
